title: Xtra Crispy Moroccan Eggplant Zaalouk
description: A paleo-friendly Moroccan dish featuring crispy filo pastry and katsuramuki-cut eggplant in a mustardy zaalouk sauce, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the filo pastry and cut it into small squares.
Brush the filo pastry squares with olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
Bake the filo pastry in the oven for 10 minutes or until crispy and golden brown.
In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the garlic and ginger until fragrant.
Add the katsuramuki-cut eggplant to the pan and cook until it is tender and lightly browned.
In a small bowl, whisk together the mustard, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the mustard sauce over the eggplant and stir to combine.
To assemble the dish, place a few pieces of the crispy filo pastry on a plate and top with the eggplant zaalouk sauce.
